translations.source: Use the hub for food, clothing, forms, housing questions, bills help, digital inclusion and wellbeing support.
translations.text: Lo ibudo fun ounjẹ, aṣọ, awọn fọọmu, awọn ibeere ile, iranlọwọ owo, ifisi oni nọmba ati atilẹyin alafia.

translations.source: Practical community support and therapeutic care sit together, so people can stabilise today and grow tomorrow.
translations.text: Atilẹyin agbegbe ti o wulo ati itọju ailera joko papọ, nitorinaa eniyan le ṣe iduroṣinṣin loni ati dagba ni ọla.
awọn [[t128]]] irú [[t129]]] ti [[t130]]] iranlọwọ [[t131]]] ìwọ [[t132]]] nilo [[t133]]] julọ.

Igbaninimoran & Idamọran [[t145]]] Ju 15,000 ọkan-si-ọkan, ẹgbẹ, tọkọtaya ati awọn akoko itọju ailera idile ti a firanṣẹ nipasẹ awọn alamọdaju ọpọlọ ti o peye. Ni-eniyan kọja awọn agbegbe iṣẹ akanṣe wa ati ori ayelujara, pẹlu itọju ọfẹ ati idiyele kekere fun agbalagba, Kirẹditi Agbaye ati awọn alabara ti n wọle-kekere.

translations.source: Over 15,000 one-to-one, group, couple and family therapy sessions delivered by qualified psychotherapists. In-person across our project boroughs and online, with free and low-cost care for elderly, Universal Credit and low-income clients.
translations.text: Ju 15,000 ọkan-si-ọkan, ẹgbẹ, tọkọtaya ati awọn akoko itọju ailera idile ti jiṣẹ nipasẹ awọn alamọdaju ọpọlọ ti o peye. Ni-eniyan kọja awọn agbegbe iṣẹ akanṣe wa ati ori ayelujara, pẹlu itọju ọfẹ ati idiyele kekere fun agbalagba, Kirẹditi Agbaye ati awọn alabara ti n wọle-kekere.
Impact Parenting [[t148]]] Awọn idanileko, 1: 1 idamọran ati awọn eto ẹgbẹ fun awọn obi, pẹlu awọn ibudo iwosan, ikẹkọ Impact Parenting Pillar ati ẹgbẹ atilẹyin aladani kan.

translations.source: Workshops, 1:1 mentoring and group programmes for parents, including therapeutic camps, the Impact Parenting Pillar training and a private support group.
translations.text: Awọn idanileko, 1: 1 idamọran ati awọn eto ẹgbẹ fun awọn obi, pẹlu awọn ibudo itọju ailera, ikẹkọ Pillar Obi Ipa ati ẹgbẹ atilẹyin aladani kan.

translations.source: A weekly Croydon hub at Ashburton Park Cafe Hall, plus community projects in Redbridge, Newham, Durham and Southwark, offering practical support, wellbeing services and advocacy.
translations.text: Ibudo Croydon osẹ kan ni Ashburton Park Cafe Hall, pẹlu awọn iṣẹ akanṣe agbegbe ni Redbridge, Newham, Durham ati Southwark, nfunni ni atilẹyin ilowo, awọn iṣẹ alafia ati agbawi.
Isinmi School & amupu; [[t154]]] Itọju ailera aworan, orin, itọju ere ati awọn ilana imọ-ọkan fun awọn ọmọde ti o wa ni ọdun 5 si 11. Ju 1,400 awọn ọmọde ti o forukọsilẹ kọja awọn eto aipẹ.

translations.source: Art therapy, music, play therapy and psychological techniques for children aged 5 to 11. Over 1,400 children registered across recent programmes.
translations.text: Itọju ailera aworan, orin, itọju ere ati awọn ilana imọ-ọkan fun awọn ọmọde ti o wa ni ọdun 5 si 11. Ju 1,400 awọn ọmọde ti forukọsilẹ kọja awọn eto aipẹ.
Forukọsilẹ [[t156]]] Food Bank & Awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ [[t157]]] Ounje itọrẹ lọsẹ-ọsẹ, awọn aṣọ ati awọn ohun elo pataki fun awọn ẹni-kọọkan ati awọn idile ti o nilo atilẹyin lẹsẹkẹsẹ.

translations.source: Weekly donated food, clothes and practical essentials for individuals and families who need immediate support.
translations.text: Ounjẹ ti a ṣetọrẹ lọsẹọsẹ, awọn aṣọ ati awọn ohun pataki ti o wulo fun awọn ẹni-kọọkan ati awọn idile ti o nilo atilẹyin lẹsẹkẹsẹ.
Imọ-imọ-owo & Atilẹyin Iṣẹ [[t160]]] Isuna, igbẹkẹle iṣẹ, atilẹyin awọn ọgbọn ati itọsọna ile-iṣẹ fun awọn eniyan ti n tun iduroṣinṣin ṣe.

translations.source: Budgeting, employment confidence, skills support and enterprise guidance for people rebuilding stability.
translations.text: Isuna, igbẹkẹle iṣẹ, atilẹyin awọn ọgbọn ati itọsọna ile-iṣẹ fun awọn eniyan atunṣe iduroṣinṣin.

ati [[t191]]] ti ara ẹni [[t192]]] idagbasoke. [[t193]]] A ni igberaga nipasẹ ẹgbẹ Oniruuru ti awọn obinrin Afirika, ti iriri igbesi aye ati oye alamọdaju ṣe apẹrẹ gbogbo apakan ti iṣẹ wa. [[t194]]] Oludasile wa, Celestina Oniye-Thomas, mọ iṣẹ yii lati inu. Lẹhin iwalaaye ibalokan ọmọde ati ọgbẹ ọpa-ẹhin ni ọdun mẹrindilogun ti awọn dokita ro pe yoo da irin-ajo rẹ duro, o kọ ararẹ lati rin lẹẹkansi, tun ṣe ikẹkọ bi oniwosan ọpọlọ inu, o si kọ Lilefofo ki awọn idile le rii iwosan ti o ni lati ja fun. [[t195]]] "Resilience ati igbẹkẹle ara ẹni gba ẹmi mi là." [[t196]]] Celestina Oniye-Thomas - Oludasile & CEO

translations.source: We are proudly led by a diverse team of African women, whose lived experience and professional expertise shape every part of our work.
translations.text: A ni igberaga nipasẹ ẹgbẹ Oniruuru ti awọn obinrin Afirika, ti iriri igbesi aye ati oye alamọdaju ṣe apẹrẹ gbogbo apakan ti iṣẹ wa.

translations.source: Our founder, Celestina Oniye-Thomas, knows this work from the inside. After surviving childhood trauma and a spinal injury at sixteen that doctors thought would stop her walking, she taught herself to walk again, retrained as an integrative psychotherapist, and built Floating so families could find the healing she had to fight for.
translations.text: Oludasile wa, Celestina Oniye-Thomas, mọ iṣẹ yii lati inu. Lẹhin iwalaaye ibalokan ọmọde ati ọgbẹ ọpa-ẹhin ni ọdun mẹrindilogun ti awọn dokita ro pe yoo da irin-ajo rẹ duro, o kọ ararẹ lati rin lẹẹkansi, tun ṣe ikẹkọ bi oniwosan ọpọlọ inu, o si kọ Lilefofo ki awọn idile le rii iwosan ti o ni lati ja fun.
"Resilience ati igbekele ara ẹni ti o ti fipamọ aye mi."

Lilefoofo [[t215]]] darapọ [[t216]]] ọdun [[t217]]] bi [[t218]]] isẹgun [[t219]]] psychotherapists [[t220]]] pẹlu [[t221]]] isẹgun [[t222]]] wakati [[t223]]] ti [[t224]]] ṣiṣẹ [[t225]]] si [[t226]]] iranlọwọ [[t227]]] awọn ẹni-kọọkan, [[t228]]] ọmọ [[t229]]] ati [[t230]]] awọn obi [[t231]]] gbe [[t232]]] dara julọ [[t233]]] ati [[t234]]] jẹ [[t235]]] dara julọ.

translations.source: The Impact Parenting approach gives families practical, scientifically grounded strategies to heal trauma, parent more effectively, and reduce generational trauma across the family system.
translations.text: Ọna Impact Parenting n fun awọn idile ni iwulo, awọn ilana ti o da lori imọ-jinlẹ lati ṣe iwosan ibalokanjẹ, obi ni imunadoko, ati dinku ibalokanjẹ iran ni gbogbo eto idile. [[t237]]] 45 ọdun [[t238]]] isẹgun iriri [[t239]]] isẹgun wakati

Otitọ [[t241]]] irinṣẹ ati awọn iṣẹ-ṣiṣe [[t242]]] Ṣe o nira lati ni oye tabi ṣakoso ihuwasi ọmọ rẹ? [[t243]] A ṣe iranlọwọ fun awọn obi lati kọ asopọ, resilience ati asomọ ilera pẹlu awọn ilana ti o wulo ti o le ṣee lo ni ile. [[t244]]] Eyi kii ṣe fun ọ ti…

translations.source: Finding it hard to understand or manage your child’s behaviour?
translations.text: Ṣe o nira lati ni oye tabi ṣakoso ihuwasi ọmọ rẹ?

translations.source: We help parents build connection, resilience and healthier attachment with practical strategies that can be used at home.
translations.text: A ṣe iranlọwọ fun awọn obi lati kọ asopọ, resilience ati asomọ ilera pẹlu awọn ilana iṣe ti o le ṣee lo ni ile.

translations.source: This is not for you if...
translations.text: Eyi kii ṣe fun ọ ti ...

translations.source: You are not ready to heal past traumas, or you do not believe your mental and physical health is worth investing in.
translations.text: O ko ṣetan lati ṣe iwosan awọn ipalara ti o kọja, tabi o ko gbagbọ pe ilera opolo ati ti ara jẹ tọ idoko-owo sinu.

aworan, [[t271]]] orin, [[t272]]] ere [[t273]]] itọju ailera, [[t274]]] iyanrin
Awọn ibi-afẹde ati awọn ibi-afẹde wa

translations.source: We are not just a holiday school. We teach children values and support them with things they need to grow up uniquely great.
translations.text: A kii ṣe ile-iwe isinmi nikan. A kọ awọn ọmọ ni iye ati atilẹyin wọn pẹlu awọn ohun ti wọn nilo lati dagba ni alailẹgbẹ nla.
EMI Ododo [[t286]]] EMI NI Ore [[t287]]] EMI NI Iduroṣinṣin

translations.source: Over 400 children were registered in 2021, over 1,000 in 2022, 200 more were supported at Easter 2023, with 1,440 available Summer 2023 slots.
translations.text: Ju awọn ọmọde 400 lọ ti forukọsilẹ ni ọdun 2021, ju 1,000 lọ ni ọdun 2022, 200 diẹ sii ni atilẹyin ni Ọjọ Ajinde Kristi 2023, pẹlu awọn iho 1,440 ti o wa ni Ooru 2023. [[t291]]] Forukọsilẹ nipasẹ Iwe-ẹri Awọn iṣẹ Isinmi
Forukọsilẹ nipasẹ Iwe-ẹri Awọn iṣẹ Isinmi
Atilẹyin ile-iwe iṣoogun ti iṣelọpọ [[t294]]] Awọn ọmọde kọ igbekele, awọn iye ati resilience nipasẹ aworan, orin, ere ati awọn iṣẹ alafia to wulo.

translations.source: Children build confidence, values and resilience through art, music, play and practical wellbeing activities.
translations.text: Awọn ọmọde kọ igbekele, awọn iye ati resilience nipasẹ aworan, orin, ere ati awọn iṣẹ alafia to wulo.

translations.source: The Croydon hub runs every Tuesday at Ashburton Park Cafe Hall. Floating also delivers community projects in Redbridge, Newham, Durham and Southwark, bringing practical advocacy, wellbeing support and local referrals closer to each community.
translations.text: ibudo Croydon nṣiṣẹ ni gbogbo ọjọ Tuesday ni Ashburton Park Cafe Hall. Lilefoofo tun n pese awọn iṣẹ akanṣe agbegbe ni Redbridge, Newham, Durham ati Southwark, mimu agbawi ti o wulo, atilẹyin alafia ati awọn itọkasi agbegbe sunmọ agbegbe kọọkan. [[t327]]] Awọn owo-owo & Awọn ifunni [[t328]]] Awọn iwe-owo ohun elo, awọn ifunni ile ati awọn iwe-ẹri ni ọsẹ akọkọ.

translations.source: Utility bills, home grants and vouchers during the first week.
translations.text: Awọn iwe-owo IwUlO, awọn ifunni ile ati awọn iwe-ẹri lakoko ọsẹ akọkọ.

translations.source: Wellbeing and housing support in Croydon, Newham and partner hubs.
translations.text: Nini alafia ati atilẹyin ile ni Croydon, Newham ati awọn ibudo alabaṣepọ. [[t331]]] Digital ifisi [[t332]]] Atilẹyin Intanẹẹti, awọn fọọmu, imọ itanjẹ, WhatsApp, eto AI ati itọsọna SIM ọfẹ. [[t333]]] Art Therapy

translations.source: Internet support, forms, scam awareness, WhatsApp, AI education and free SIM guidance.
translations.text: Atilẹyin Intanẹẹti, awọn fọọmu, imọ itanjẹ, WhatsApp, eto AI ati itọsọna SIM ọfẹ.

translations.source: Third-week creative healing with Myfamily101 and Floating Counselling Community.
translations.text: Iwosan iṣẹda ti ọsẹ kẹta pẹlu Myfamily101 ati Floating Counselling Community. [[t335]]] Food Bank [[t336]]] Ounjẹ osẹ-ọsẹ, aṣọ ati awọn nkan pataki fun ẹni-kọọkan ati awọn idile.

translations.text: Ounjẹ osẹ, aṣọ ati awọn nkan pataki fun ẹni kọọkan ati awọn idile.
Atilẹyin iṣẹ [[t338]]] Imọwe owo, igbẹkẹle ati atilẹyin iṣẹ fun iduroṣinṣin igba pipẹ. [[t339]]] Croydon ọfiisi

translations.source: Financial literacy, confidence and employment support for longer-term stability.
translations.text: Imọwe owo, igbẹkẹle ati atilẹyin iṣẹ fun iduroṣinṣin igba pipẹ.

translations.source: Ashburton Park Cafe Hall, CR0 6RX. Tuesdays, 12:30 to 2:30pm.
translations.text: Ashburton Park Cafe Hall, CR0 6RX. Tuesdays, 12:30 to 2:30 aṣalẹ.

translations.text: Cranbrook House, gbon 7D, 61 Cranbrook Road, Ilford, IG1 4PG. Tuesdays, 11:30am to 1:30pm ayafi awọn isinmi.

translations.text: Nini alafia oṣooṣu ati atilẹyin ile. Ilọsiwaju ni Oṣu Keje ọdun 2026.

Gbo [[t365]]] lati [[t366]]] awọn [[t367]]] idile [[t368]]] ati [[t369]]] awọn ẹni-kọọkan [[t370]]] tani [[t371]]] aye [[t372]]] ni [[t373]]] jẹ [[t374]]] yipada. [[t375]]] Mo ti kọ ẹkọ pupọ lati ikẹkọ Impact Parenting Pillar ati Celestina. O jẹ iyipo daradara ti iyalẹnu ati atilẹyin ọpọlọpọ awọn ọran ti awọn obi koju. Mo ni awọn ọmọde ọdọ ati pe Mo nilo eyi gaan. O kun fun imọ si obi diẹ sii ni mimọ.

translations.source: I have learned so much from Impact Parenting Pillar training and Celestina. It was incredibly well-rounded and supported a wide variety of issues that parents face. I have teenage children and really needed this. It was full of knowledge to parent more consciously.
translations.text: Mo ti kọ ẹkọ pupọ lati ikẹkọ Parenting Pillar ati Celestina. O jẹ iyipo daradara ti iyalẹnu ati atilẹyin ọpọlọpọ awọn ọran ti awọn obi koju. Mo ni awọn ọmọde ọdọ ati pe Mo nilo eyi gaan. O kun fun imọ si obi diẹ sii ni mimọ.

ST [[t377]]] Sarah Turino [[t378]]] CEO, The Gbogbo Women Nini alafia agbekalẹ · USA [[t379]]] Ọmọ mi ni ẹru meji meji nibiti yoo gbe ara rẹ si ilẹ ti ko si tẹle awọn aala. Ní báyìí, a ti ràn mí lọ́wọ́ láti mọ ìwà rẹ̀ dáadáa, wọ́n sì ti fún mi láwọn irinṣẹ́ tó mọ́gbọ́n dání láti ràn án lọ́wọ́ láti túbọ̀ fara dà á lọ́nà onífẹ̀ẹ́.

translations.source: CEO, The Whole Woman Wellness Formula · USA
translations.text: CEO, The Whole Women Wellness Formula · USA

translations.source: My son had terrible twos where he would throw himself on the floor and not follow boundaries. I have now been helped to know his personality better and been given realistic tools to help him be more resilient in a loving way.
translations.text: Ọmọ mi ní ẹru twos ibi ti o ti yoo jabọ ara lori pakà ati ki o ko tẹle awọn aala. Ní báyìí, a ti ràn mí lọ́wọ́ láti mọ ìwà rẹ̀ dáadáa, wọ́n sì ti fún mi láwọn irinṣẹ́ tó mọ́gbọ́n dání láti ràn án lọ́wọ́ láti túbọ̀ fara dà á lọ́nà onífẹ̀ẹ́.

DD [[t381]]] Danya Denny [[t382]]] Awujọ Osise · UK [[t383]]] Gẹgẹbi iya ti ọmọ mẹfa, lati ọmọ tuntun si mejidilogun, Mo kọ ẹkọ pupọ lati Impact Parenting pẹlu Celestina. Mo tun ṣe awọn ilana naa si igbesi aye gidi mi ati gbogbo awọn ọmọ mi lẹsẹkẹsẹ - ati pe Mo tun nlo wọn ni awọn oṣu diẹ lẹhinna. Gbogbo obi nilo eyi.

translations.source: As a mother of six, from newborn to eighteen, I learnt so much from Impact Parenting with Celestina. I adapted the strategies to my real life and all my children straight away — and I'm still using them months later. Every parent needs this.
translations.text: Gẹgẹbi iya ti ọmọ mẹfa, lati ọmọ tuntun si mejidilogun, Mo kọ ẹkọ pupọ lati Impact Parenting pẹlu Celestina. Mo tun ṣe awọn ilana naa si igbesi aye gidi mi ati gbogbo awọn ọmọ mi lẹsẹkẹsẹ - ati pe Mo tun nlo wọn ni awọn oṣu diẹ lẹhinna. Gbogbo obi nilo eyi.

translations.source: Author & Founder, Mother of Nations · Congo
translations.text: Onkọwe & Oludasile, Iya ti Orilẹ-ede · Congo
Awọn onigbọwọ, awọn alabaṣepọ ati awọn agbateru [[t422]]] Atilẹyin [[t423]]] nipasẹ [[t424]]] gbẹkẹle [[t425]]] awọn alabaṣepọ.
awọn agbateru, [[t432]]] onigbowo [[t433]]] ati [[t434]]] awọn iforukọsilẹ [[t435]]] sile [[t436]]] awọn [[t437]]] iṣẹ.
Awọn ibeere ti o wọpọ [[t439]]] Ohun gbogbo [[t440]]] ìwọ [[t441]]] le [[t442]]] jẹ [[t443]]] iyalẹnu.
Ti o ba jẹ [[t445]]] tirẹ [[t446]]] ibeere [[t447]]] kii ṣe

Elo ni iye owo idamọran? [[t459]]] Awọn akoko jẹ ọfẹ tabi iye owo kekere fun awọn ẹni kọọkan ti o yẹ. A ṣiṣẹ lori iwọn sisun da lori awọn ayidayida. Pataki wa ni iwọle, ati pe a yoo wa ọna ti o ṣiṣẹ fun ọ. [[t460]]] Kini o ṣẹlẹ ni igba akọkọ? [[t461]]] Igba akọkọ rẹ jẹ ibaraẹnisọrọ ni isinmi nipa ohun ti o mu wa wọle, kini o fẹ lati ṣiṣẹ lori, ati bi a ṣe le ṣe atilẹyin fun ọ. Ko si ohun ti a yara. O ṣeto iyara naa.

translations.source: Sessions are free or low-cost for eligible individuals. We work on a sliding scale based on circumstances. Our priority is access, and we'll find a way that works for you.
translations.text: Awọn akoko jẹ ọfẹ tabi idiyele kekere fun awọn ẹni-kọọkan ti o yẹ. A ṣiṣẹ lori iwọn sisun da lori awọn ayidayida. Pataki wa ni iwọle, ati pe a yoo wa ọna ti o ṣiṣẹ fun ọ.

translations.source: What happens in the first session?
translations.text: Kini o ṣẹlẹ ni igba akọkọ?

translations.source: Your first session is a relaxed conversation about what's brought you in, what you'd like to work on, and how we can support you. Nothing is rushed. You set the pace.
translations.text: Igba akọkọ rẹ jẹ ibaraẹnisọrọ ni ihuwasi nipa ohun ti o mu wa wọle, kini o fẹ lati ṣiṣẹ lori, ati bii a ṣe le ṣe atilẹyin fun ọ. Ko si ohun ti a yara. O ṣeto iyara naa.

translations.source: Yes. Everything you share is held in strict confidence in line with BACP ethical guidelines. The only exceptions are safeguarding situations, which we'd always discuss with you first wherever possible.
translations.text: Bẹẹni. Ohun gbogbo ti o pin ni o waye ni igbẹkẹle ti o muna ni ila pẹlu awọn ilana iṣe iṣe BACP. Awọn imukuro nikan ni awọn ipo aabo, eyiti a yoo ma jiroro nigbagbogbo pẹlu rẹ ni akọkọ nibikibi ti o ṣeeṣe. [[t464]]] Ṣe o nṣe awọn akoko ori ayelujara bi?
Ṣe o funni ni awọn akoko ori ayelujara?

translations.source: Yes. We offer online sessions and in-person support across the boroughs where we deliver services.
translations.text: Bẹẹni. A nfunni ni awọn akoko ori ayelujara ati atilẹyin eniyan ni gbogbo awọn agbegbe nibiti a ti fi awọn iṣẹ ranṣẹ. [[t466]]] Ṣe awọn oniwosan ara ẹni ni oṣiṣẹ bi? [[t467]]] Awọn oniwosan aisan wa jẹ awọn alamọdaju ti ile-iwosan ti n ṣiṣẹ ni ila pẹlu awọn iṣedede BACP. Ẹgbẹ oludari ni awọn ọdun 45+ ti apapọ iriri ile-iwosan ati ju awọn wakati ile-iwosan 50,000 lọ. [[t468]]] Ṣe Mo le tọka si ọmọ ẹbi tabi ọrẹ kan?
Ṣe awọn oniwosan ọran rẹ ni oṣiṣẹ bi?

translations.source: Our therapists are clinically trained psychotherapists working in line with BACP standards. The leadership team has 45+ years of combined clinical experience and over 50,000 clinical hours.
translations.text: Awọn oniwosan aisan wa jẹ awọn alamọdaju ti ile-iwosan ti n ṣiṣẹ ni ila pẹlu awọn iṣedede BACP. Ẹgbẹ oludari ni awọn ọdun 45+ ti apapọ iriri ile-iwosan ati ju awọn wakati ile-iwosan 50,000 lọ.

translations.source: Can I refer a family member or friend?
translations.text: Ṣe Mo le tọka si ọmọ ẹgbẹ tabi ọrẹ kan bi?

translations.source: Absolutely. We'll always need consent from the person themselves before opening a case. The best first step is to encourage them to email or WhatsApp us directly.
translations.text: Nitõtọ. A yoo nilo igbanilaaye nigbagbogbo lati ọdọ eniyan funrararẹ ṣaaju ṣiṣi ọran kan. Igbesẹ akọkọ ti o dara julọ ni lati gba wọn niyanju lati imeeli tabi WhatsApp wa taara. [[t470]]] Bawo ni MO ṣe le ṣe atilẹyin iṣẹ rẹ?

translations.source: How can I support your work?
translations.text: Bawo ni MO ṣe le ṣe atilẹyin iṣẹ rẹ?

translations.source: You can donate via Localgiving or PayPal, volunteer your time, follow us on social media, or fundraise on our behalf. Visit the fundraiser section or get in touch and we'll match you to something that suits.
translations.text: O le ṣetọrẹ nipasẹ Localgiving tabi PayPal, yọọda akoko rẹ, tẹle wa lori media awujọ, tabi ikowojo fun wa. Ṣabẹwo apakan ikowojo tabi gba ifọwọkan ati pe a yoo baamu rẹ si nkan ti o baamu.
ikowojo [[t480]]] ṣe iranlọwọ [[t481]]] pa [[t482]]] Igbaninimoran, [[t483]]] ounje [[t484]]] atilẹyin, [[t485]]] isinmi [[t486]]] ile-iwe [[t487]]] ibi [[t488]]] ati [[t489]]] agbegbe

translations.source: Use birthdays, challenges or community events to raise funds for counselling and wraparound support.
translations.text: Lo awọn ọjọ ibi, awọn italaya tabi awọn iṣẹlẹ agbegbe lati gba owo fun imọran ati atilẹyin ipari.

translations.source: Collect food, essentials, vouchers or donations with your team, school, faith group or local business.
translations.text: Gba ounjẹ, awọn nkan pataki, awọn iwe-ẹri tabi awọn ẹbun pẹlu ẹgbẹ rẹ, ile-iwe, ẹgbẹ igbagbọ tabi iṣowo agbegbe.

translations.source: Support a hub session, holiday school activity, counselling session or local wellbeing event.
translations.text: Ṣe atilẹyin igba ibudo, iṣẹ ile-iwe isinmi, igba igbimọran tabi iṣẹlẹ alafia agbegbe.

translations.source: Offer professional skills, event support, transport, mentoring or practical help for local residents.
translations.text: Pese awọn ọgbọn alamọdaju, atilẹyin iṣẹlẹ, gbigbe, idamọran tabi iranlọwọ iṣe fun awọn olugbe agbegbe.

translations.source: Help residents with food, clothing, forms, signposting, events and welcoming hub sessions.
translations.text: Ṣe iranlọwọ fun awọn olugbe pẹlu ounjẹ, aṣọ, awọn fọọmu, fifi ami si, awọn iṣẹlẹ ati awọn akoko ibudo gbigba aabọ.
Awọn ogbon ati awọn iṣẹ akanṣe

translations.source: Offer mentoring, admin, creative workshops, fundraising, transport, digital support or professional expertise.
translations.text: Pese oludamoran, abojuto, awọn idanileko iṣẹda, ikowojo, gbigbe, atilẹyin oni-nọmba tabi oye alamọdaju.
Kan si atinuwa [[t544]]] Pari ohun elo atinuwa ki ẹgbẹ le baamu akoko rẹ, awọn ọgbọn ati wiwa si iṣẹ akanṣe ti o tọ.

translations.source: Complete the volunteer application so the team can match your time, skills and availability to the right project.
translations.text: Pari ohun elo atinuwa ki ẹgbẹ le baamu akoko rẹ, awọn ọgbọn ati wiwa si iṣẹ akanṣe ti o tọ.

translations.source: Separate contact points for Croydon, Redbridge, Durham, Newham and Southwark are listed below.
translations.text: Awọn aaye olubasọrọ ọtọtọ fun Croydon, Redbridge, Durham, Newham ati Southwark ti wa ni akojọ si isalẹ.

translations.source: 61 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PG. Tuesdays, 11:30am to 1:30pm except holidays.
translations.text: 61 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PG. Tuesdays, 11:30am to 1:30pm ayafi awọn isinmi.

translations.source: Heaton Road Church, Peckham SE15 3NL. Launching June 2026.
translations.text: Heaton Road Ìjọ, Peckham SE15 3NL. Ifilọlẹ Oṣu Kẹfa ọdun 2026.

translations.source: Housing and wellbeing support relaunching July 2026.
translations.text: Ile ati alafia ṣe atilẹyin isọdọtun Oṣu Keje 2026. [[t604]]] Orukọ rẹ [[t605]]] Imeeli
Kini a le ṣe iranlọwọ pẹlu? [[t607]]] Ifiranṣẹ

translations.source: I agree to be contacted in line with the
translations.text: Mo ti gba a olubasọrọ ni ila pẹlu awọn
A wa nibi [[t612]]] Ohunkohun ti [[t613]]] iwọ ni
gbigbe, [[t615]]] ìwọ [[t616]]] ma ṣe [[t617]]] gbe [[t618]]] o [[t619]]] nikan. [[t620]]] Boya [[t621]]] ìwọ [[t622]]] nilo [[t623]]] Igbaninimoran, [[t624]]] agbegbe [[t625]]] atilẹyin,
Iyọọda [[t646]]] Awọn ilana & asiri rẹ [[t647]]] Bii a ṣe daabobo ọ ati data rẹ.

translations.source: How we protect you and your data.
translations.text: Bii a ṣe daabobo ọ ati data rẹ.

translations.source: A plain-English summary of how we handle your information, keep people safe, and use cookies. For the full policies or any request, email
translations.text: Akopọ Gẹẹsi-Gẹẹsi ti bi a ṣe n ṣakoso alaye rẹ, tọju eniyan lailewu, ati lilo awọn kuki. Fun awọn eto imulo ni kikun tabi eyikeyi ibeere, imeeli

translations.source: Floating Counselling Community is a UK grassroots organisation providing counselling and community support since 2015. We operate as FLOATING COUNSELLING COMMUNITY, a company limited by guarantee registered in England and Wales, company number 11334515. We are the data controller for information you share with us. For privacy requests, email
translations.text: Floating Counselling Community jẹ ile-iṣẹ grassroots UK ti n pese imọran ati atilẹyin agbegbe lati ọdun 2015. A n ṣiṣẹ gẹgẹbi AWUJO FLOATING COUNSELING, ile-iṣẹ ti o ni opin nipasẹ iṣeduro ti a forukọsilẹ ni England ati Wales, nọmba ile-iṣẹ 11334515. A jẹ oludari data fun alaye ti o pin pẹlu wa. Fun awọn ibeere ikọkọ, imeeli [[t653]]] info@floatingcounselling.co.uk

translations.source: or write to our Croydon office at 26 Avenue Road, London SE25 4DX.
translations.text: tabi kọ si ọfiisi Croydon wa ni 26 Avenue Road, London SE25 4DX.

translations.source: When you contact us through the enquiry form, by email or WhatsApp, we receive the details you choose to give us — typically your name, email address, the topic you select and your message. If you sign up to our newsletter we collect your email address. We do not ask for special-category health information through this website; please share only what you're comfortable with.
translations.text: Nigbati o ba kan si wa nipasẹ fọọmu ibeere, nipasẹ imeeli tabi WhatsApp, a gba awọn alaye ti o yan lati fun wa - ni igbagbogbo orukọ rẹ, adirẹsi imeeli, koko ti o yan ati ifiranṣẹ rẹ. Ti o ba forukọsilẹ si iwe iroyin wa a gba adirẹsi imeeli rẹ. A ko beere fun alaye ilera-ẹka pataki nipasẹ oju opo wẹẹbu yii; jọwọ pin nikan ohun ti o ni itunu pẹlu.

translations.source: How we use it, and our lawful basis.
translations.text: Bii a ṣe nlo rẹ, ati ipilẹ t’olofin wa.

translations.source: We use your details to reply to you, provide the support you ask for, and run our services (UK GDPR "consent" and "legitimate interests"). Where we have a duty to protect someone, we may process information to meet a legal obligation (see Safeguarding).
translations.text: A lo awọn alaye rẹ lati dahun si ọ, pese atilẹyin ti o beere fun, ati ṣiṣe awọn iṣẹ wa (UK GDPR "igbanilaaye" ati "awọn anfani ti o tọ"). Nibiti a ti ni ojuse lati daabobo ẹnikan, a le ṣe ilana alaye lati pade ọranyan labẹ ofin (wo Aabo). [[t659]]] Eni ti a pin pelu. [[t660]]] A ko ta data rẹ. A gbẹkẹle nọmba kekere ti awọn olupese iṣẹ ti o gbẹkẹle ti o ṣe iranlọwọ fun wa lati ṣiṣe oju opo wẹẹbu, imeeli, awọn fọọmu, awọn ohun elo atinuwa, awọn ẹbun ati awọn maapu. Olupese kọọkan gba alaye ti o nilo fun iṣẹ yẹn nikan, ati pe ọkọọkan ni akiyesi asiri tirẹ.

translations.source: We don't sell your data. We rely on a small number of trusted service providers who help us run the website, email, forms, volunteer applications, donations and maps. Each provider only receives the information needed for that service, and each has its own privacy notice.
translations.text: A ko ta data rẹ. A gbẹkẹle nọmba kekere ti awọn olupese iṣẹ ti o gbẹkẹle ti o ṣe iranlọwọ fun wa lati ṣiṣe oju opo wẹẹbu, imeeli, awọn fọọmu, awọn ohun elo atinuwa, awọn ẹbun ati awọn maapu. Olupese kọọkan gba alaye ti o nilo fun iṣẹ yẹn nikan, ati pe ọkọọkan ni akiyesi asiri tirẹ.

Itumọ. [[t662]]] Ti o ba tumọ oju-iwe yii, ọrọ oju-iwe oju-iwe le jẹ firanṣẹ ni aabo si iṣẹ itumọ kan ki ẹda ti a tumọ le jẹ pada. Itumọ jẹ iyan, awọn ifiranṣẹ fọọmu olubasọrọ kii ṣe itumọ nipasẹ ẹya ara ẹrọ yii, ati pe ọrọ ti a tumọ le jẹ cache ninu ẹrọ aṣawakiri rẹ ki o le yara yiyara nigba miiran. [[t663]]] Bawo ni pipẹ ti a tọju rẹ.

translations.source: If you translate this page, the on-screen page text may be sent securely to a translation service so the translated version can be returned. Translation is optional, contact-form messages are not translated by this feature, and translated text may be cached in your browser so it loads faster next time.
translations.text: Ti o ba tumọ oju-iwe yii, ọrọ oju-iwe loju iboju le jẹ firanṣẹ ni aabo si iṣẹ itumọ kan ki ẹya ti o tumọ le jẹ pada. Itumọ jẹ iyan, awọn ifiranṣẹ fọọmu olubasọrọ kii ṣe itumọ nipasẹ ẹya ara ẹrọ yii, ati pe ọrọ ti a tumọ le jẹ cache ninu ẹrọ aṣawakiri rẹ ki o le yara yiyara nigba miiran.
Bawo ni pipẹ ti a tọju rẹ.

translations.source: We keep enquiry and support-request details only for as long as needed to respond, provide support, meet safeguarding duties, and comply with legal or accounting obligations. Donation and volunteer records are kept according to the relevant provider and legal retention requirements.
translations.text: A tọju ibeere ati awọn alaye ibeere atilẹyin nikan niwọn igba ti o nilo lati dahun, pese atilẹyin, pade awọn iṣẹ aabo, ati ni ibamu pẹlu awọn adehun ofin tabi iṣiro. Awọn ẹbun ati awọn igbasilẹ iyọọda ni a tọju ni ibamu si olupese ti o yẹ ati awọn ibeere idaduro ofin.

translations.source: Under UK GDPR you can ask to access, correct, delete or restrict your data, object to processing, request portability, or withdraw consent at any time. Email
translations.text: Labẹ UK GDPR o le beere lati wọle si, ṣe atunṣe, paarẹ tabi ni ihamọ data rẹ, nkan si ṣiṣe, beere gbigbe, tabi yọkuro aṣẹ nigbakugba. Imeeli

translations.source: or write to us at 26 Avenue Road, London SE25 4DX. If you're unhappy with our response you can complain to the ICO at ico.org.uk.
translations.text: tabi kọ si wa ni 26 Avenue Road, London SE25 4DX. Ti o ko ba ni idunnu pẹlu esi wa o le kerora si ICO ni ico.org.uk.

translations.source: Last reviewed: 29 May 2026. This plain-English summary is provided for transparency and should be checked against Floating Counselling Community's full policies before publication.
translations.text: Atunyẹwo to kẹhin: 29 Oṣu Karun ọdun 2026. Akopọ Gẹẹsi-Gẹẹsi ni a pese fun akoyawo ati pe o yẹ ki o ṣayẹwo ni kikun awọn ilana Floating Counselling Community ṣaaju ki o to tẹjade. [[t670]]] Idaabobo [[t671]]] Ifaramo wa. [[t672]]] Aabo ati alafia ti awọn ọmọde, awọn ọdọ ati awọn agbalagba ti o wa ninu ewu ti a ṣiṣẹ pẹlu wa ni akọkọ. Iṣe wa jẹ alaye ibalokanje ati ni ibamu pẹlu awọn iṣedede iṣe BACP.

translations.source: The safety and wellbeing of the children, young people and adults at risk we work with comes first. Our practice is trauma-informed and aligned with BACP ethical standards.
translations.text: Ailewu ati alafia ti awọn ọmọde, awọn ọdọ ati awọn agbalagba ti o wa ninu ewu ti a ṣiṣẹ pẹlu wa ni akọkọ. Iṣe wa jẹ alaye ibalokanje ati ni ibamu pẹlu awọn iṣedede iṣe BACP.

translations.source: What you share is held in strict confidence. The exception is a safeguarding situation — where there is a risk of serious harm to you or someone else, or where we have a legal duty to act. Wherever it is safe to do so, we will talk this through with you first.
translations.text: Ohun ti o pin wa ni idaduro ni idaniloju to muna. Iyatọ jẹ ipo aabo - nibiti eewu ti ipalara nla wa si ọ tabi ẹlomiiran, tabi nibiti a ni ojuṣe labẹ ofin lati ṣe. Nibikibi ti o ba jẹ ailewu lati ṣe bẹ, a yoo sọrọ eyi nipasẹ rẹ akọkọ.

translations.source: If you're worried about someone's safety, contact us at
translations.text: Ti o ba ni aniyan nipa aabo ẹnikan, kan si wa ni

translations.source: or +44 (0)7305 882959. If someone is in immediate danger, always call 999. You can also contact the NSPCC on 0808 800 5000, or your local authority's safeguarding team.
translations.text: tabi +44 (0)7305 882959. Ti ẹnikan ba wa ninu ewu lẹsẹkẹsẹ, nigbagbogbo pe 999. O tun le kan si NSPCC lori 0808 800 5000, tabi ẹgbẹ aabo ti aṣẹ agbegbe rẹ.
Awọn eniyan wa. [[t680]]] Awọn oṣiṣẹ ati awọn oluyọọda ti gba iṣẹ lailewu ati gba awọn sọwedowo DBS nibiti o yẹ si ipa wọn.

translations.source: Staff and volunteers are recruited safely and receive DBS checks where appropriate to their role.
translations.text: Awọn oṣiṣẹ ati awọn oluyọọda ti gba iṣẹ lailewu ati gba awọn sọwedowo DBS nibiti o yẹ si ipa wọn.

translations.source: Linda Yeboah, Director & Safeguarding Officer. Email
translations.text: Linda Yeboah, Oludari & Oṣiṣẹ Idaabobo. Imeeli [[t683]]] floatingcounsellinglinda@gmail.com [[t684]]] tabi

translations.source: . If someone is in immediate danger, call 999.
translations.text: . Ti ẹnikan ba wa ninu ewu lẹsẹkẹsẹ, pe 999.

translations.source: Last reviewed: 29 May 2026. This summary should be checked against Floating Counselling Community's full safeguarding policy before publication.
translations.text: Atunyẹwo to kẹhin: 29 May 2026. Akopọ yii yẹ ki o ṣayẹwo lodi si ilana aabo ni kikun Floating Counselling Community ṣaaju ki o to gbejade. [[t688]]] Awọn kuki & ibi ipamọ

translations.source: We keep cookies to a minimum and don't use advertising or cross-site tracking. The site stores a couple of small items in your browser:
translations.text: A tọju awọn kuki si o kere julọ ati pe a ko lo ipolowo tabi titọpa aaye. Aaye naa tọju awọn nkan kekere meji meji sinu ẹrọ aṣawakiri rẹ:
Igbanilaaye kuki [[t691]]] - ranti pe o ti rii akiyesi yii, nitorinaa a ko ṣe afihan ni gbogbo ibewo.

translations.source: — remembers that you've seen this notice, so we don't show it every visit.
translations.text: — ranti pe o ti rii akiyesi yii, nitorinaa a ko ṣe afihan ni gbogbo ibewo.

Kaṣe itumọ [[t693]]] - ti o ba tumọ oju-iwe naa, ọrọ ti a tumọ ti wa ni ipamọ ni agbegbe nitoribẹẹ o le di ẹru lẹsẹkẹsẹ ni akoko miiran. [[t694]]] Google Map ti a fi sinu le ṣeto awọn kuki ti Google nigbati o ba nrù. O le pa gbogbo awọn ti o wa loke kuro nigbakugba nipa yiyọ data aaye aṣawakiri rẹ kuro.

translations.source: — if you translate the page, the translated text is saved locally so it loads instantly next time.
translations.text: - ti o ba tumọ oju-iwe naa, ọrọ ti a tumọ ti wa ni fipamọ ni agbegbe nitoribẹẹ o le di ẹru lẹsẹkẹsẹ ni akoko miiran.

translations.source: The embedded Google Map may set Google's own cookies when it loads. You can clear all of the above at any time by clearing your browser's site data.
translations.text: Maapu Google ti a fi sinu le ṣeto awọn kuki ti Google nigbati o ba nrù. O le pa gbogbo awọn ti o wa loke kuro nigbakugba nipa yiyọ data aaye aṣawakiri rẹ kuro.
